note.zh: 在 WorkBuddy（DeepSeek V4 Pro 后端）中一次生成，未修复。包含 Perlin 噪声（FBM 5 倍频）3D 地形、WASD + 指针锁定鼠标第一人称操控、9 种方块（草地、泥土、石头、原木、树叶、沙子、水、黑曜石、水晶），每种带 Canvas 程序化纹理、四种神话建筑（水晶塔尖顶、石环阵祭坛、龙骨肋骨遗迹、天空浮岛废墟），按 G 键传送至各地标，底部 HUD 选方块（1-9），支持左键破坏右键放置，带光照阴影和雾效。
note.en: Generated in one shot via WorkBuddy (DeepSeek V4 Pro backend), no fixes. Features Perlin noise (FBM 5 octaves) 3D terrain, WASD + pointer-lock mouse first-person controls, 9 block types (grass, dirt, stone, wood, leaves, sand, water, obsidian, crystal) each with procedural Canvas textures, four mythic structures (Crystal Tower spire, Stone Circle altar, Dragon Skeleton ribcage, Sky Ruins floating island), G to teleport between landmarks, bottom HUD block selector (1-9), left-click break right-click place, with directional lighting, shadows, and fog.

note.zh: 非 one-shot：首版存在 JS 运行时错误（`noise3d` 大小写拼写错误）和全量重建性能问题导致点击交互失效。在 WorkBuddy（DeepSeek V4 Pro 后端）中根据提示词「我发现当前已经创建出来的 MassCraft 没办法点击互动」进行诊断与修复。修复内容包括：修正 `perlin.noise3d` → `noise3D`、增量方块更新替代全量重建（meshMap 哈希表）、仅渲染暴露面、异步构建+加载进度条。功能与首版相同：Perlin 噪声 3D 地形、WASD+指针锁定操控、9 种方块+程序化纹理、4 种神话建筑、G 键传送、左键破坏右键放置。
note.en: Not one-shot: the first version had a JS runtime error (`noise3d` case typo) and full-rebuild performance issues causing broken click interaction. Diagnosed and fixed in WorkBuddy (DeepSeek V4 Pro backend) using the prompt 'The MassCraft I created can't be clicked/interacted with'. Fixes: corrected `perlin.noise3d` → `noise3D`, incremental block updates replacing full rebuilds (meshMap hash table), exposed-face-only rendering, async build with loading bar. Same features: Perlin noise 3D terrain, WASD+pointer-lock controls, 9 block types with procedural textures, 4 mythic structures, G teleport, left-click break right-click place.

note.zh: 在 WorkBuddy（DeepSeek V4 Pro 后端）中一次生成。SVG 场景包含渐变天空和太阳光晕、白云、远山、渐变海洋和波浪线、沙滩纹理和沙波纹、贝壳和小花、两棵带椰子细节的棕榈树、三只飞行海鸥、红色自行车（辐条轮毂、链条齿轮、曲柄踏板、把手座垫）、白色鹈鹕（橙色长喙带钩尖、喉囊、黑色翼尖、带蹼的脚掌踩踏在踏板上、白色身躯带灰度羽翼纹理），以及地面阴影和水中太阳倒影。
note.en: Generated in one shot via WorkBuddy (DeepSeek V4 Pro backend). SVG scene includes gradient sky with sun glow, white clouds, distant mountains, gradient ocean with wave lines, textured sand beach with ripples, seashells and flowers, two palm trees with coconut details, three flying seagulls, a red bicycle (spoked wheels, chain and gear, crank pedals, handlebars and seat), white pelican (orange beak with hooked tip, gular pouch, black wing tips, webbed feet on pedals, grey-scale wing feather textures), plus ground shadows and sun reflection on water.
